title: Kalman Prototypical Networks for Few-shot Fault Detection in Combined Cycle Gas Turbines
abstract: arXiv:2606.26710v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Combined-cycle gas turbines (CCGTs) play a key role in modern power generation, offering both high efficiency and reduced environmental impact. However, their complex thermo-fluid and mechanical interactions complicate fault detection, particularly when labeled fault data are scarce. In this paper, we introduce the Kalman Prototypical Network (KPN), a metric-based few-shot learning (FSL) framework specifically tailored for CCGT fault diagnosis. We model the evolution of class prototypes as latent stochastic states in a dynamic system to reduce episodic variance and improve robustness in embedding representation. Synthetic data sets generated with a high-fidelity Modelica-based dynamic simulation of an offshore CCGT system were used, simulating both normal operation and progressive leak faults under transient conditions. Application of the proposed framework on simulated leak fault detection tasks demonstrate that KPN outperforms conventi

translated_title: 卡尔曼原型网络用于联合循环燃气轮机的少样本故障检测
translated_abstract: 联合循环燃气轮机在现代发电中扮演关键角色，兼具高效率和较低的环境影响。然而，其复杂的热流体与机械相互作用使得故障检测变得困难，尤其是在标记故障数据稀缺的情况下。本文提出卡尔曼原型网络，一种专为联合循环燃气轮机故障诊断设计的基于度量的少样本学习框架。我们将类原型的演化建模为动态系统中的潜在随机状态，以减少情景方差并提高嵌入表示的鲁棒性。使用基于高保真Modelica动态仿真生成的离岸联合循环燃气轮机系统合成数据集，模拟了瞬态条件下的正常运行和渐进泄漏故障。在模拟泄漏故障检测任务上的应用表明，卡尔曼原型网络优于传统方法。
tldr: 本文提出卡尔曼原型网络，通过将类原型建模为动态系统中的潜在随机状态，有效提升了少样本场景下联合循环燃气轮机故障检测的鲁棒性和准确性。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes the Kalman Prototypical Network, which models class prototypes as latent stochastic states in a dynamic system to enhance robustness and accuracy in few-shot fault detection for combined-cycle gas turbines.
